nasb.text: There fire will consume you, The sword will cut you down; It will consume you as the locust does. Multiply yourself like the creeping locust, Multiply yourself like the swarming locust.

esv.text: There will the fire devour you; the sword will cut you off. It will devour you like the locust. Multiply yourselves like the locust; multiply like the grasshopper!

cnv.text: 在那裡火要燒滅你， 刀劍要除滅你， 吞吃你，好像吞吃蚱蜢一樣， 你只管增多如蚱蜢， 加添像蝗蟲，

ccb.text: 但在那里，火要吞噬你， 刀剑要杀戮你， 要像蝗虫吞没你。 你只管像蝗虫一样繁殖， 如蚱蜢一般增多吧！
